title: Creamy Smoky French Chickpeas Tarte Tatin
description: A smoky and velvety French dish featuring chickpeas in a tarte tatin form, made in a hot pot vessel. This satvik-friendly recipe is perfect for a light and flavorful meal.
instructions: Preheat the hot pot vessel over medium heat.
In a bowl, toss the chickpeas with smoked paprika, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the vegetable oil to the hot pot vessel and saute the onion until caramelized.
Add the chickpeas to the hot pot vessel and cook for 5 minutes.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the heavy cream and flour.
Pour the cream mixture over the chickpeas and onion in the hot pot vessel.
Cook for an additional 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce thickens.
Remove the hot pot vessel from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Serve the creamy smoky French chickpeas tarte tatin hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
